name: blossom_lv15
description: A/B leg B (control): the same Jabari battle with an AT-CAP party (Totodile lv15, base cap 15) — distinguishes cap-gating from a general dialog-battle failure. Party is reset to just the Totodile + a dex filler.

steps.comment: -- party reset to at-cap: drop every slot, then totodile 15 + magikarp 3 for dex_gte_2 --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon totodile level=15
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon magikarp level=3

steps.comment_: cross-scenario attrition guard (live-caught 2026-07-18: fights entered with fainted leads make autobattle pass turns forever = endless slow loss)

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.wait_chat: The meadow looks after its own
